name: NodeBench GTM Strategy
question: What is NodeBench's best next distribution move to get 10 paying pilots in 90 days?

sources.summary: 289 tools, 950+ tests, 63 Convex domains, 3 published npm packages
5,200+ MCP servers on npm, Claude Code 2M+ downloads, Cursor 1.5M+ users
Daily research posts averaging 8K impressions, 1.8% engagement
4 DMs from founders, 2 from VCs, 1 enterprise inquiry in 30 days
87% hybrid search accuracy, 8-dimension trajectory scoring operational
Active in 3 Discord communities, 1 Twitter/X thread with 50K impressions

goldenMemo.recommendation: Focus on Claude Code power users who already use MCP servers — offer a 'decision workbench' preset that ships inside their existing workflow

scenarios.title: MCP-first distribution
scenarios.keyAssumption: Claude Code users adopt MCP tools with low friction

scenarios.title: Content-led inbound
scenarios.keyAssumption: LinkedIn posts convert to demo requests at 0.5% rate

scenarios.title: Enterprise direct sales
scenarios.keyAssumption: Enterprise buyers will evaluate a pre-revenue tool

interventions.title: Publish nodebench-mcp to npm with 'decision workbench' preset
Create 3-minute demo video showing CEO workflow end-to-end
Reach out to 5 Claude Code power users for beta feedback
Submit to MCP server directories and awesome-mcp lists

counterModel.thesis: MCP ecosystem is too fragmented — users want integrated SaaS, not CLI tools
counterModel.whatWouldValidate: npm install rate < 50/week after 30 days of promotion

traceability.description: Every claim links to a source

recommendationClarity.description: Recommendation includes clear wedge and falsification criteria
